description_long: This object is a rifle with a classic design, featuring a wooden stock, handguard, and pistol grip, all rendered in a warm brown color. The receiver and barrel assembly are finished in a dark metallic gray, giving the weapon a robust and utilitarian appearance. The rifle has a fixed wooden stock at the rear, a prominent curved detachable magazine, and a standard-length barrel with a simple front sight post. The handguard and grip are both made of wood, providing a traditional aesthetic and likely a comfortable hold. The overall silhouette is reminiscent of the iconic AK-pattern rifles, with a straightforward, functional layout. The visible components include the trigger, magazine release, and iron sights, all contributing to its recognizable profile.
description: A classic rifle with a wooden stock, handguard, and grip, paired with a dark metal receiver and barrel. It features a curved magazine and iron sights, evoking a traditional, robust firearm design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the wooden stock, handguard, grip, curved magazine, and barrel with front sight.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel's end, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the wooden stock and handguard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the wooden components, magazine, and barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
